final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup of a comprehensive design system featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls in a classic minimal tech style.

Style/medium: clean flat vector UI design system, sharp geometric forms, minimal tech aesthetic inspired by Linear and Vercel design language
Composition: multi-panel layout — large Dashboard panel on left, mobile screen frame on right, component library grid (cards, buttons, toggles, sliders) arranged below, generous spacing between panels
Subject: web Dashboard with data charts, KPI metric cards, sidebar navigation; mobile interface with app screens; UI component set including filled/outlined buttons, toggle switches, input fields, dropdown menus, progress bars, icon set
Scene/backdrop: deep dark navy or near-black background (#0A0A0F tone), subtle grid or dot-matrix texture at low opacity
Lighting/mood: layered glow effects — cool electric blue and cyan accent glows on active components, soft purple highlight on selected states, creating depth and visual hierarchy without clutter
Color palette: deep black/navy as base, electric blue (#00AAFF range) as primary accent, cyan and violet as secondary accents, white and light gray for typography and borders
Materials/textures: frosted glass card surfaces with subtle border highlights, smooth flat button fills, thin 1px separator lines, micro-shadow elevation system
Constraints: all components must be clearly legible at mockup scale; maintain consistent 8pt grid alignment; dark mode only
Avoid: gradients that look dated or rainbow; neon overload; cluttered layouts; drop shadows that look skeuomorphic; generic Bootstrap-style components; watermarks
